items.definition_en: A Chelsea boot is an ankle-high boot with elastic side panels.
items.example_en: He wore classic black Chelsea boots to work.

items.definition_en: A desert boot is an ankle-high suede boot with a crepe sole.
items.example_en: Her brown desert boots were perfect for walking.

items.definition_en: A hiking boot is a sturdy shoe designed for outdoor walks.
items.example_en: He packed his hiking boots for the trip.

items.definition_en: A platform shoe is a shoe with a thick sole.
items.example_en: Her platform shoes added several inches to her height.

items.definition_en: A deck shoe is a casual shoe designed for boating.
items.example_en: He wore blue deck shoes on the yacht.

items.definition_en: A combat boot is a strong boot worn by soldiers.
items.example_en: She bought new combat boots for the festival.

items.definition_en: A Mary Jane is a flat shoe with a strap over the foot.
items.example_en: The girl wore her favorite black Mary Janes.

items.definition_en: A brogue is a leather shoe with decorative perforations.
items.example_en: His brown brogues were perfect for the meeting.

items.definition_en: A monk strap is a shoe fastened with a buckle instead of laces.
items.example_en: Monk strap shoes look smart with suits.

items.definition_en: A peep-toe is a shoe with an opening at the toe.
items.example_en: She chose red peep-toes for the party.

items.definition_en: A work boot is a strong boot used for manual labor.
items.example_en: He wore heavy work boots on the construction site.

items.definition_en: A cowboy boot is a high leather boot with decorative stitching.
items.example_en: He put on cowboy boots for the country dance.

items.definition_en: A skating boot is a shoe used for ice or roller skating.
items.example_en: She tightened her skating boots before entering the rink.

items.definition_en: A Chelsea sneaker is a casual trainer with elastic side panels.
items.example_en: He bought grey Chelsea sneakers for casual wear.

items.definition_en: A lace-up boot is a boot fastened with laces.
items.example_en: Her lace-up boots were perfect for autumn.

items.definition_en: A slip-on shoe is a shoe you can put on without fastening.
items.example_en: He likes slip-on shoes for everyday use.

items.definition_en: A Jodhpur boot is a close-fitting ankle boot with a strap.
items.example_en: She wore Jodhpur boots for horseback riding.

items.definition_en: A chukka boot is an ankle-high leather boot with open lacing.
items.example_en: Chukka boots work well with jeans and chinos.

items.definition_en: A riding boot is a high boot designed for horse riding.
items.example_en: The rider wore tall riding boots.
